day_to_day.description: No day-to-day bonuses

cop.name: Hyper Repair
cop.description: Restores 2 HP to all own units

scop.name: Hyper Upgrade
scop.description: +10% ATK and DEF to all own units (SCOPB only; no unique bonus)

day_to_day.description: +20% ATK for indirect units, -20% ATK for direct units

cop.name: Snipe Attack
cop.description: +1 attack range to all indirect units

scop.name: Super Snipe
scop.description: +2 attack range to indirect units; +30% additional ATK for indirect units

day_to_day.description: +30% ATK and DEF to all units; own units cost 120% of base price

cop.name: Morale Boost
cop.description: +10% additional ATK

scop.name: Samurai Spirit
scop.description: +10% additional ATK and 20% additional DEF to all own units; counterattacks deal 1.5x damage

day_to_day.description: +10% DEF and +1 movement for naval units.  -30% Air attack

cop.name: Tsunami
cop.description: All enemy units take 1 HP damage; all enemy air units lose 1 fuel per tile

scop.name: Typhoon
scop.description: All enemy units take 2 HP damage; all enemy air units lose 2 fuel per tile

day_to_day.description: +20% ATK for direct units, -10% ATK for indirect units

cop.name: Max Force
cop.description: +10% additional ATK for direct units

scop.name: Max Blast
scop.description: +30% additional ATK for direct units (total +50% over base with D2D)

day_to_day.description: +30% ATK for infantry and mech; -10% ATK for vehicles; +50% capture speed for infantry and mech

cop.name: Double Time
cop.description: +1 movement to all infantry units

scop.name: Victory March
scop.description: All infantry and mech units can complete a capture in one step regardless of remaining HP; +1 movement to infantry

day_to_day.description: Own units suffer no movement penalty in snow; snow falls at the start of Olaf's turns; +10% ATK/DEF in snow (always active for Olaf)

cop.name: Blizzard
cop.description: Causes snowfall; all enemy units lose 1 movement

scop.name: Winter Fury
scop.description: All enemy units take 2 HP damage; causes snowfall; own units unaffected by snow movement penalties

day_to_day.description: Air units +15% ATK, +10% DEF, -2 fuel/day; naval units -30% ATK (AWBW wiki)

cop.name: Lightning Drive
cop.description: Air units +5% ATK and +10% DEF (AWBW wiki; stacks with universal COP/SCOP +10%/+10%)

scop.name: Lightning Strike
scop.description: Air +5% ATK and +10% DEF; all non-footsoldier units may move and fire again, even if built this turn (AWBW wiki)

day_to_day.description: +1 movement to all own units

cop.name: Sideslip
cop.description: +1 additional movement to all own units (stacks with D2D for +2 total)

scop.name: Sidewinder
scop.description: +2 additional movement to all own units (stacks with D2D for +3 total)

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK to all units

cop.name: Black Wave
cop.description: All enemy units take 1 HP damage; all own units recover 1 HP

scop.name: Black Storm
scop.description: All enemy units take 2 HP damage; all own units recover 2 HP

day_to_day.description: +40% ATK for infantry, mech, and copter units; -10% ATK for vehicles and naval; spawns mechs on owned bases at turn start

cop.name: Copter Command
cop.description: +30% additional ATK for copter units; spawns one infantry on each owned city

scop.name: Airborne Assault
scop.description: Spawns one infantry on every owned city and base

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK for vehicles, all others -10% ATK

cop.name: Turbo Charge
cop.description: +10% additional ATK for vehicles; all vehicles gain +1 movement.  All units are refueled and rearmed

scop.name: Overdrive
scop.description: +20% additional ATK for vehicles; all vehicles gain +2 movement. all units are refueled and rearmed

day_to_day.description: All own units cost 80% of base price; earns +10% bonus funds per owned property

cop.name: Gold Rush
cop.description: Current fund total is multiplied by 1.5

scop.name: Power of Money
scop.description: ATK is boosted proportional to current fund total (more funds = higher ATK bonus)

day_to_day.description: Gains bonus ATK equal to the terrain star rating of the tile the attacking unit occupies, does not apply to air units

cop.name: Terrain Tactics
cop.description: Terrain star value counts double for defensive purposes for all own units, movement cost for all terrain is reduced to 1 except for snow

scop.name: Prime Tactics
scop.description: Terrain star value counts double for both ATK (D2D bonus doubled) and DEF for all own units, movement cost for all terrain is reduced to 1 except for snow

day_to_day.description: unit cost -10% to build

cop.name: Barter
cop.description: All unit production costs reduced to 50% for one turn regardless of deployment location

scop.name: Merchant Union
scop.description: Own units can be deployed from any owned city (not just bases/airports/ports); all unit costs reduced to 50%

day_to_day.description: Units gain +1 vision in Fog of War, and counterattacks do 1.5x more damage. All units have hidden HP, but have bad luck (-9% to +9% luck).

cop.name: Enhanced Vision
cop.description: All units gain +1 vision, and can see into forests and reefs.

scop.name: Counter Break
scop.description: All units gain +1 vision, and can see into forests and reefs. A unit being attacked will attack first (even if it would be destroyed by the attack).

day_to_day.description: Receives +100 income per property (excluding Labs and Comm Towers).

cop.name: Market Crash
cop.description: Reduces enemy power bar(s) by 10% of their full bar per 5000 funds (1% per 500 funds).

scop.name: War Bonds
scop.description: Receives funds equal to 50% of the damage dealt when attacking enemy units.

day_to_day.description: +30% ATK to all units, -20% DEF for all units

cop.name: Knuckleduster
cop.description: +20% additional ATK to all own units

scop.name: Haymaker
scop.description: +50% additional ATK to all own units

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK bonus when own units attack from a road tile

cop.name: Forced March
cop.description: +1 movement to all own units when moving on road tiles, +10% on roads

scop.name: Trail of Woe
scop.description: +20% ATK bonus when attacking from roads; +2 movement

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK bonus when own units attack from a plain tile

cop.name: Beat Down
cop.description: Land indirects gain +1 range, and plains bonus is increased to +20%.

scop.name: Block Rock
scop.description: Land indirects gain +1 range, plains bonus is increased to +40%, and vehicles gain +2 movement.

day_to_day.description: All units (even air units) gain +40% attack while on properties (excluding Missile Silos).

cop.name: Urban Blight
cop.description: All enemy units lose -3HP on urban terrain. Urban bonus is increased to +80%.

scop.name: High Society
scop.description: Urban bonus is increased to +130%, and attack for all units is increased by +3% for every property owned.

day_to_day.description: +10% luck bonus (attack damage can randomly roll 0-19% higher than base)

cop.name: Lucky Star
cop.description: Luck is improved to +0% to +59%.

scop.name: Lady Luck
scop.description: Luck is improved to +0% to +99%.

day_to_day.description: Luck on attacks is -9 to +24%.

cop.name: Brute Force
cop.description: Luck range is changed to -19% to +49%.

scop.name: Barbaric Blow
scop.description: Luck range is changed to -39% to +89%.

day_to_day.description: Luck on attacks is -14% to +29%.

cop.name: Overclock
cop.description: Luck range is changed to -24% to +54%.

scop.name: Firestorm
scop.description: Luck range is changed to -44% to +94%.

day_to_day.description: Units gain +20% defense against indirect units. Comm Towers grant all units additional +10% defense.

cop.name: Tower Shield
cop.description: Indirect defense is increased to +40%. Comm Tower bonuses are doubled.

scop.name: Tower of Power
scop.description: Indirect defense is increased to +80%. Comm Tower bonuses are tripled.

day_to_day.description: Units repair +1 additional HP on properties (note: liable for costs).

cop.name: Lucky Lass
cop.description: Luck is improved to +0% to +39%.

scop.name: Covering Fire
scop.description: Three 2-range missiles deal 3HP damage each. The missiles target the opponents' greatest accumulation of footsoldier HP, unit value, and unit HP (in that order).

day_to_day.description: Movement cost over all terrain is reduced to 1, except in snow. Units lose -20% attack and gain +20% defense.

cop.name: Meteor Strike
cop.description: A 2-range missile deals 4HP damage. The missile targets an enemy unit located at the greatest accumulation of unit value.

scop.name: Fury Storm
scop.description: A 2-range missile deals 8HP damage. The missile targets an enemy unit located at the greatest accumulation of unit value.

day_to_day.description: +10% ATK and DEF to all units

scop.name: Ex Machina
scop.description: A 2-range missile deals 3HP damage and prevents all affected enemy units from acting next turn. The missile targets the opponents' greatest accumulation of unit value.
